original_image_tags: A beige document slip, likely a routing or receipt card. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The document contains two stamps with dates. The text is oriented sideways relative to the card's landscape orientation. Faint, illegible text from the reverse side of the paper is visible through the card stock.

elements.description: Multiple ink stamps on a faded page with visible bleed-through text. Includes stamps reading 'RECEIVED-LAND FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE DEC 28 3 55 PM '48' and 'RECEIVED JAN 9 2 55 PM '49 INTERNAL REVENUE F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Two punch holes are visible at the top.

judge.reason: Description A claims the document text is illegible while Description B provides specific, verbatim quoted text from stamps, creating a direct contradiction on the readability and content of the visual elements.
